description: File-backed status page and health checker for SAP BTP services

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.admin
scopes.description: Grants admin privileges: change evaluation mode and schedule overrides, trigger tests and on-demand sync

role-templates.name: BTP_Status_Admin
role-templates.description: Admin access to BTP Status — evaluation mode, schedule overrides, Run Test and Sync

role-collections.name: BTP Status Admin
role-collections.description: Assign to users who need admin access to BTP Status
